findings.description: Nested <main> landmark elements - ensure the document has at most one main landmark at top level
findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: No h1 heading exists in the HTML. The document title '15A NCAC 03R .0103 PRIMARY NURSERY AREAS' is rendered as a bold paragraph rather than an h1 heading, and there are no heading elements used at all in the document.
findings.evidence:
HTML uses

15A NCAC 03R .0103 PRIMARY NURSERY AREAS

instead of an h1 element. No h1-h6 tags are present in the document.

findings.description: The HTML contains a nested <main> element inside another <main> element, which is a structural duplication artifact.

In section (12)(c) Sanders Creek, the degree symbols are missing from the coordinates in the HTML, matching the PDF source which also lacks them. However, this is not a conversion error since the PDF source itself lacks degree symbols for this entry.
findings.evidence: Both PDF and HTML show: '34 42.4694' N - 76 58.3754' W' and '34 42.4903' N - 76 58.1434' W' - this matches the source, so not a conversion error.
